items.name: Twin Kodachi
items.description: From the Asuna Samurais comes this twin Kodachi. With its lightness and speed, the Kodachi is deadly in the hands of any true Samurai warrior. Give them two and see them cut through their opponents as if they were made of paper.

items.name: Geolocator
items.description: This military-grade geolocator is designed to withstand a 1000 foot fall. It will point true North in any environment, anywhere on the planet, with an accuracy of .0001 degrees...

items.name: Overseer Short Sword
items.description: Ready to do some serious damage? Hit 'Q' to summon 5 Overseer minions to do your bidding for up to two minutes.

items.name: Drum Kit
items.description: Darthskrill's drum kit can be yours!  Rock out like JParty and the Meme Lords with this stylish kit.

items.name: Atomic Disintegrator 3100
items.description: Great for destroying those pesky humans.  On the flip side - excellent for stopping alien invaders.  Which side will you fight for?

items.name: Sword of the Epicblueness
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 16 to 22 damage. Hit the 'Q' key, to shoot blue flames out in all directions, which will knock back your enemies and deal 25 additional damage! This special has a 10 second cool down. The Epicblueness is the stuff of vampires and will restore 25% of your health.

items.name: Crimsonwrath: The Red Wrath
items.description: For when you're really mad bro. Send your enemies to meet their maker... or whatever. Click to slash; double click to lunge. When using, your speed is boosted 4 points making you slightly faster, enough to trail behind enemies which flee. Each kill, the sword gets even stronger for a few seconds! When killed, enemies turn into flaming transparent red ghosts which quickly fade away up into the sky!

items.name: Foul Poison Fowl
items.description: Shoots poisonous green fire!  Equip the Poison Fowl and watch as it flies around you in a defensive circle, shooting at nearby enemies (25 damage per hit) for as long as five minutes.

items.name: Personal UFO
items.description: Drive your own personal UFO with up to 8 passengers! Use 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys to control the direction and 'Q' to raise the UFO, 'E' to lower it. Click and hold to suck up players beneath you into the ship and press 'T' while they are in the beam to teleport players into an open seat on your UFO. Use ' L' to control your sweet UFO lights.

items.name: Smore
items.description: Nutrition for the soul.

items.name: Spy All Terrain Vehicle
items.description: Every spy needs a car that’s a boat, and a boat that’s a car.

items.name: XLS Mark II Pulse Laser Pistol
items.description: The XLS Mark II Pulse Laser Pistol is standard issue in the intergalactic police corps.

items.name: Tyrannosaurus
items.description: Rawrr!  TREX HUNGRY!

items.name: Dual Spec Gamma Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: Dual wield version of the Spec Gamma Biograft Energy Click to slash, double click to lunge.

items.name: Super-G LS33 Disruptor
items.description: The Super-G LS33 Disruptor is banned throughout the Federation. It's use against other Robloxians is classified as a war crime.

items.name: Darksteel Katana of Ancient Illuminators
items.description: It shall not break, it shall not bend. If you think you can avoid its explosion, your time is at an end. Use the 'A' 'W' and 'D' keys to create an explosion that will leave your opponents reeling!

items.name: Regeneration Coil
items.description: The latest in the power coils family - the health regeneration coil will help you regenerate your health quickly.

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: Use this to smash things up real good!

items.name: Ice Blue Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Be blue cool when you’re rolling.  Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys while leaving snow behind you. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: Joyful Periastron Epsilon
items.description: The sword men use to hunt colorful eggs... in space.

items.name: Mystic Sword of the Flames
items.description: Courage is fire. Slash away at your enemies and leave behind a burning trail of death.  This sword does 15 - 22 damage per swing, trail burns 5 damage per step.

items.name: Interplanetary Light Sword
items.description: It glows with an otherworldly power...

items.name: Epicsauce
items.description: Ultimate EPIC Juice Brand Epicsauce. Extremely hot.

items.name: Spikey Stick of Civilized Negotiation
items.description: You think this is your land. Actually, it's mine. If you have a problem with that, let's talk about it.

items.name: Blow Dryer
items.description: Point and hold down the left mouse button to unleash a stream of hot air that will blow the competition away (quite literally).

items.name: Pumpkin Pi
items.description: This is for everyone who complained that the last contest was too easy... MUAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

items.name: Rainbow Disco Hyperbike
items.description: Ride around in style. This bike will leave a rainbow trail of light to mark where you've been

items.name: Trollamon
items.description: This Tiny Trolling Telamon will follow you around and throw his precious fried chicken at your enemies- doing 15 damage per chicken strike.  Justice has never been more savory.

items.name: Super Speedy Purple Potion
items.description: This speed potion is very nearly perfect.  Once activated your walk speed will be increased to 50.  One side effect we should mention is that you will turn temporarily purple and sparkly.  Like we said ... very nearly perfect.

items.name: Spec Epsilon Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: The superintelligent cloud people of the distant future find the history of human conflict hilarious and ironic. To that end, they created these weapons to sell in museum gift shops as a living reminder of the pinnacle of human stupidity. (WHY DO YOU NEED HAND TO HAND WEAPONS WHEN YOU HAVE LAZORS?!) Because the cloud people are incorporeal, the swords are completely harmless and they allow their young to play with them.
